preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menus WHERE code = 'ai-assistant'

changeSet.author: wafer-bi
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO menu_groups (group_id, menu_id) SELECT g.id, m.id FROM auth_groups g, menus m WHERE (g.name = 'admin' OR g.name = 'user') AND m.code = 'ai-assistant' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM menu_groups mg WHERE mg.group_id = g.id AND mg.menu_id = m.id);
